overall.description: Static first-person view from inside a luxury high-rise apartment in Cyberpunk 2077, overlooking the Night City skyline through panoramic windows. The camera remains stationary throughout the clip as a television cycles through various futuristic advertisements and programs, casting changing colored light across the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury high-rise bedroom with panoramic Night City view

events.description: television screen transitions to bright blue display with earth graphic, casting cool blue light across the room
television switches to dark imagery featuring a caped figure, significantly dimming the ambient lighting
television displays bright yellow advertisement, illuminating the space with warm golden light

agents.ego_description: standing stationary in the apartment, facing the television and the panoramic city view through the windows

entered.detail: large bed with white and gray bedding, partially visible in the foreground
floor-to-ceiling windows with horizontal blinds overlooking the city skyline
large flatscreen television displaying cycling advertisements and video content
large illuminated water feature with greenish-blue lighting and fish tank appearance
ceiling with parallel wooden slats and recessed lighting
futuristic cityscape visible through windows with illuminated buildings and overcast sky

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place in a luxurious, dimly lit cyberpunk apartment bedroom with a panoramic view of Night City. The camera remains static throughout, capturing the room's modern aesthetic with wooden ceiling slats, a large bed in the foreground, and a glowing aquarium wall. A television cycles through various futuristic advertisements, periodically changing the room's ambient lighting from cool blues to warm yellows to dark shadows as different content plays.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a luxury cyberpunk bedroom as the ambient atmosphere shifts through a cycle of contrasting colors. It begins in a dimly lit space characterized by modern wooden ceiling slats, a large bed, and a glowing aquarium wall overlooking the Night City skyline. As a television cycles through various futuristic advertisements, the room's lighting continuously transforms, shifting from cool blues to warm yellows. The scene then settles into deep, dark shadows before returning to vibrant hues as the screen content changes. This constant play of light and shadow dynamically alters the mood of the high-rise interior against the backdrop of the city.
